title: Gmail authentication error
creator: blm7171
content: I believe since your last update, every time my phone switches a data provider, meaning goes from cellular data to my Wi-Fi or vice versa. Or if you go to airplane mode and then come out of it I get the Gmail authentication error. Every single time. I'm running Samsung Galaxy s23 running the latest version of Android 16. Has anyone else had this issue? I find it hard to believe that I would be the only one. It's getting really annoying having to keep clearing it or going in and then when you go into go through the settings it tells you it doesn't work. Any help would be appreciated.
